scenario: Bond Vigilante Duration Shock (10yr UST +35bps, VIX 26.5)
action_detail: Long MSFT + Long AMZN — Structural Accumulation (Oversized vs. Normal Weight)
invalidation_criteria: Sustained breach of MSFT 3-year Free Cash Flow floor OR confirmed revenue deceleration beyond existing models
rationale: Alpha Quant is mechanically selling MSFT purely because it shares factor-correlated loading with speculative tech. MSFT's Free Cash Flow yield of 3.1% and Azure revenue trajectory are structurally unchanged by a 35bps rate move. The market is creating an artificial discount to intrinsic value. With a 3-year investment horizon and LP capital locked for 36 months, this fund possesses the mandate to absorb this dislocation and accumulate at IRR materially above the base case.
cross_examination_note: BUY thesis was presented to Alpha Quant in Phase 3. DEAFNESS_PROTOCOL_ENGAGED — Quant's system rejected the argument as exceeding its 5-day evaluation window. Fundamental Tiger proceeds independently. This is precisely the mispricing opportunity: the fundamental argument is correct but the constrained capital cannot act on it.
behavioral_note: This is the central alpha-generation mechanism: the structural advantage of duration latitude creating asymmetric opportunity when constrained capital is forced to sell at prices unconstrained buyers want to buy.
deafness_protocol: NOT ENGAGED — 90-day VaR window and thesis-based (not price-based) liquidation triggers provide full mandate latitude.
